elements.title: lang::report_page_007_block_1_element_1_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT 
    kbi_u.id        AS u_id,
    kbi_u.firstname,
    kbi_u.lastname,
    COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ctx.instanceid)  AS num_courses,
    SUM(l.learners)                 AS num_learners,
    SUM(l1.activelearners)          AS num_activelearners,
    SUM(cc.completed)               AS num_completedlearners,
    AVG(kbi_g.grade)                    AS grade
FROM mdl_user kbi_u
LEFT JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
LEFT JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_c.visible = 1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        kbi_ctx.instanceid, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ra.userid) AS learners
    FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra, mdl_context kbi_ctx
    WHERE 
        kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
        AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
        AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
    GROUP BY 
        kbi_ctx.instanceid
) AS l ON l.instanceid = kbi_ctx.instanceid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        kbi_ctx.instanceid, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ra.userid) AS activelearners
    FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra, mdl_user kbi_u, mdl_context kbi_ctx
    WHERE 
        kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
        AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
        AND kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
        -- AND kbi_u.lastaccess BETWEEN 1707755694 AND 1710347694
        AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
        AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
        AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
    GROUP BY 
        kbi_ctx.instanceid
) AS l1 ON l1.instanceid = kbi_ctx.instanceid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        course, 
        COUNT(id) AS completed
    FROM 
        mdl_course_completions
    WHERE 
        timecompleted > 0
    GROUP BY 
        course
) cc ON cc.course = kbi_ctx.instanceid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        kbi_gi.courseid,
        ROUND(AVG(CASE
            WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
            ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade 
        END), 0) AS grade
    FROM mdl_grade_items kbi_gi, mdl_grade_grades kbi_g
    WHERE 
        kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
        AND kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id
        AND kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        kbi_gi.courseid
) g ON kbi_g.courseid = kbi_ctx.instanceid
WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
  AND kbi_ra.roleid        = 3
  AND kbi_u.deleted        = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended      = 0
GROUP BY kbi_u.id, kbi_u.firstname, kbi_u.lastname

elements.title: lang::report_page_007_block_2_element_1_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_c.id       AS c_id,
       kbi_c.fullname AS c_fullname,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ra.userid) AS num_learners,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
           WHEN comp.userid IS NOT NULL AND kbi_ula.id IS NOT NULL THEN kbi_u.id
           ELSE NULL 
       END) AS completed_learners,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
           WHEN comp.userid IS NULL AND kbi_ula.id IS NOT NULL THEN kbi_u.id
           ELSE NULL 
       END) AS not_completed_learners,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
           WHEN kbi_ula.id IS NULL THEN kbi_u.id 
           ELSE NULL 
       END) AS not_accessed_learners
FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx 
    ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
JOIN mdl_course kbi_c 
    ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid
JOIN mdl_user kbi_u 
    ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid
    FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
    JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc 
        ON kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id AND kbi_cmc.completionstate = 1
    WHERE kbi_cmc.id > 0
    GROUP BY kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid
) comp 
    ON comp.userid = kbi_u.id AND comp.course = kbi_c.id
LEFT JOIN mdl_user_lastaccess kbi_ula 
    ON kbi_ula.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_ula.userid = kbi_ra.userid
WHERE kbi_c.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
GROUP BY kbi_c.id

completed_learners.title: lang::completed_learners::local_kopere_bi
completed_learners.mustache: {{{completed_learners}}} / {{{num_learners}}}

not_completed_learners.title: lang::not_completed_learners::local_kopere_bi
not_completed_learners.mustache: {{{not_completed_learners}}} / {{{num_learners}}}

not_accessed_learners.title: lang::not_accessed_learners::local_kopere_bi
not_accessed_learners.mustache: {{{not_accessed_learners}}} / {{{num_learners}}}
